category_sources: Official GNOME help describes Archive Manager as managing compressed archives of files and folders.
source_facts.description says File Roller is the GNOME archive manager.
display_name_sources: GNOME wiki page title and official help identify the application as File Roller/Archive Manager.
source_facts.homepage is the official GNOME FileRoller page.
docs_sources: Official GNOME Help provides the Archive Manager/File Roller user documentation.
Official GNOME wiki page is the application project page.
repo_sources: Official GNOME wiki page lists the Git clone URL gitlab.gnome.org/GNOME/file-roller.git.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repo lookup was required.
tags_sources: Official GNOME Help describes managing compressed archives.
source_facts.description identifies it as the GNOME archive manager.
